Founding Membership

Become One of the
First Twenty-Five.

The first cohort receives our earliest rate and helps shape the club from the very beginning.

This is where East | West begins.

Apply for Founding Membership
How It Works

Membership Begins Before Opening.

Founding Membership unfolds in three stages. Here’s what happens from the day you join to opening day.

01

Join Today

Secure your Founding Membership, earliest rate, and place in the club’s first cohort. You’ll begin receiving invitations to early gatherings and member communications immediately.

02

Before Opening

Meet fellow Founding Members through dinners, previews, tastings, and early programming as East | West takes shape. By opening day, many of the people you meet will already be familiar faces.

03

Opening Day

Your four-year membership officially begins. The relationships, routines, and traditions you’ve already started now have a place to continue.

Before there was East | West, there were two friends with a standing tee time and a habit of imagining the places they wished existed.
